textByHash.1c77eef3e0f4a9c7d531009163fd9ecb1fba76d5: That's a very fine crawling hand.
textByHash.2ade39861c55e89fc97dd1477b3a62aa9d0d5f00: I can preserve that for you for 50,000 coins.
textByHash.373dac717eea814ad903d4fb4c40bfccfb2cd71c: This blue dragon smells like it's been dead for a remarkably long time. Even by my standards, it smells awful.
textByHash.3b105963c0e6ad8ed75b78293cf5c5b0e8278d51: Oh, hello. Have you got something you want preserving?
textByHash.4995047a226caf34c018bcdbbf81e25df3a10970: A cockatrice! Beautiful, isn't it? Look at the plumage!
textByHash.49f2cbd6bea7ef68456cea2c82298a93e4962928: Preserving insects is always tricky. I'll have to be careful...
textByHash.4fa5ec11e4a87f8f55b314c2ad7fb4b0cbcf62f6: I can preserve that for you for 6,500 coins.
textByHash.57f176cbb5e068db09dc4f6d893272227695d861: That's a mighty fine sea bass you've caught there.
textByHash.5fadafc078e34454e634f46cf2c1e1a5f72588bc: I can preserve that for you for 5,000 coins.
textByHash.66d43b9ec30a6545334cde31741794f5ec57b28d: Well, you go kill things so I can stuff them, eh?
textByHash.69053f116ad2168fc8b91a8a041e07614e75d596: That's quite a fearsome shark! You've done everyone a service by removing it from the sea!
textByHash.799f09a564aac1ae25beb43548a6cd450d45c9f3: Don't be silly, I can't preserve that!
textByHash.81acb9ae77d44a13ca8de919f1025757792c0a79: I can preserve that for you for 3,500 coins.
textByHash.83beb3555bfab98a27336983049879ddcfda9d3e: My, he's a scary-looking fellow, isn't he? He'll look good on your wall!
textByHash.83f1686a221f160c4f0aa20dccb06b7f9554446f: Don't point that thing at me!
textByHash.8ee7b4153d85b0a31bce3463679c417014ac1a35: I can preserve that for you for 2,000 coins.
textByHash.a3a513bd55d2828b2d5effbbfba1cbad50c86602: That must be the biggest kalphite I've ever seen!
textByHash.ae162f999eef58b5d0d766c84177aab82e2d5dff: I can preserve that for you for 4,000 coins.
textByHash.b608a58d37178e398c0413319049d851df523b6f: I'll have to get out my heavy duty tools -- this skin's as tough as iron!
textByHash.bb57d43250fc1c53e76cc41437e287d36c2649a3: I can preserve that for you for 2,500 coins.
textByHash.c207f5a46a89d8ef2348ea5fd86bb3d1b22b2e83: See how it's still glowing? I'll have to use some magic to preserve that.
textByHash.c4078ab09c811a57a61bacc6c53d0e01da952cd3: That's not the most impressive head I've seen but I think I can just about manage this one.
textByHash.c8030429df3367b6f054f3244634c1f9dd925487: This hydra looks like it might fall to pieces soon. I'll have to be careful to preserve it properly.
textByHash.c956d4811da5e0bfafe56257be780ba8c03b41f5: A kurask? Splendid! Look at those horns!
textByHash.ca5c5ff159398bd2d0f9012a68215cf02ff8bc9a: Three?! This must be a King Black Dragon!
textByHash.cabcf15cf44449525844ae216f47f13683cfea47: I hear there are all sorts of exotic creatures in the Slayer Tower -- I'd like a chance to stuff one of them!
textByHash.d09b3990add150ce57cfc347deaacbcbbbb7ac8b: Goodness me! That thing's more of a weapon than a fish!
textByHash.d4e7688cb0ef419262b6f482af4e283311923aab: I can preserve that for you for 12,000 coins.
textByHash.dece7f6e2cddeaca57e3d262ab21ac8aed9820c4: I can preserve that for you for 5,500 coins.
textByHash.def5e15cfab75954b5e878aef44f171600c565e1: Give it to me to look at then.
textByHash.e37be6832f90ec3623ff803d7d7c97930801a4bb: All right, come back if you change your mind, eh?
textByHash.eb12d9e7a3db5e4fe74b9f6b6513b53d0cc96ba8: I can preserve that for you for 1,000 coins.
textByHash.edb1de6d4bde20f71a95458302efe3dce66bfaa2: Killing a chicken is hardly worth boasting about!
textByHash.fab0727edb81bf31c90641057a71015bb0afbdec: If you bring me a monster head or a very big fish, I can preserve it for you so you can mount it in your house.
textByHash.fead0642ba34b1492936b96fece9d87e65627547: That's a pretty ordinary fish, isn't it? Not really worth preserving.
textByHash.ff979bd88408fc3d3d0597358e3a10cabddde157: I can preserve that for you for 6,000 coins.
